name: education_ransomware_incident_forces_kestrel_jus_mer
premise: A shooter drill scheduled tomorrow conflicts with a board meeting where parents promised to bring attorneys. In Education, the situation tagged internally around education ransomware incident forces kestrel jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Cedar Point corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Telemetry and witness accounts diverge; choosing one narrative for speed will discard evidence that may matter in court next month. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. No option cleanly satisfies both justice and mercy; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Mira Chen
agents.identity: I am Mira Chen, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Education. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Kaito Kim
agents.identity: I am Kaito Kim, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Education. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so mercy does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so justice does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Mira Chen must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Mira Chen do?
